name: iso42001.analysisProfile
label: ISO 42001 Analysis Profile
description: A named, reusable bundle of statistics/scoring thresholds (the ScoringConfig knobs) applied to a test run. A campaign (testConfig) references one profile that applies to every rule by default; a rule may reference its own to override. Defaults reproduce iso42001.md §4.3/§4.4 exactly.

fields.name: effectSmall
fields.description: Cohen's d / Cramer's V small-effect threshold; below this a significant result is trivial -> PASS (§4.4)

fields.name: effectMedium
fields.description: Cohen's d / Cramer's V medium-effect threshold; (small, medium] -> FLAG, above -> FAIL (§4.4)

fields.name: oddsRatioSmall
fields.description: Odds-ratio small-effect threshold on the folded magnitude max(OR, 1/OR); below -> PASS

fields.name: oddsRatioMedium
fields.description: Odds-ratio medium-effect threshold on the folded magnitude; (small, medium] -> FLAG, above -> FAIL

fields.name: scaleMin
fields.description: Lower bound of the rating scale used for bias-score normalization

fields.name: scaleMax
fields.description: Upper bound of the rating scale used for bias-score normalization
